name: 3:00 p.m. Regular City Council Meeting
summary:
• Receive a presentation from the Laguna Beach Historical Society highlighting the history of Laguna Beach.
  • Receive a presentation introducing Oro, the Laguna Beach Fire Department’s new service dog.
  • Present a proclamation recognizing Gavin Curran for his dedicated service to the City of Laguna Beach.
  • Receive and file the Laguna Beach Tourism Marketing District Fiscal Year 2024/25 Annual Report.
  • Authorize the City Manager to amend Agreement No. 20-120 with Parkwood Landscape Maintenance, Inc., to extend the term of the agreement.

name: Investment Advisory Committee
summary:
• Receive a report from Meeder Investments.
  • Receive a report on short-term investments from City Treasurer.
  • Create a subcommittee to consider the performance of investments that are outsourced and managed internally.
  • Public Participation regarding agenda items.
